title: Spec /status resources never registered; Observe stubs empty
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:709-724,746-763. spec/11-lci.md §17.7: minimal node MUST implement /status; full impl: Observe on status resources; §17.5.3: status updates pushed via Observe on significant changes. The spec-shaped resources are never registered with any service (nothing references lichen_coap_status_resource et al. anywhere in the tree) — the only live /status (apps/gateway/src/main.c:323) serves a different non-spec schema (rank/role/rpl_capable/uptime_ms). lichen_coap_status_notify()/neighbors_notify() are empty stubs that never call coap_resource_notify(), and the resources are const (Zephyr Observe registration mutates them). Fix: register via COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE like the other handlers, implement notify triggers.
